text.p: Those rides!!! I never stop thinking about you. I have a couple of pics with us on the bus. I look at them often. was in Abuja for four days. She's gone back now. She might be moving to Nigeria. Economic refugee I often tease. It is easier for a white person to get work here.
I am attending a book launch in a nearby city, Zaria. Boring. Hijacked by non writers. lol.
I am writing a lot. Plenty of it is rubbish but some can be salvaged I think. WHat are you working on.
